title: Add "Is" or "Is Not" as part conditional logic for Groups
excerpt:
For Custom Automations it would be great to be able to edit the conditions of if the item is included (“is”) or is not included (“is not”) as part of the current condition “and only if item is in group”. 
As of now you h…

posts.author: jailynnhoops (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
For Custom Automations it would be great to be able to edit the conditions of if the item is included (“is”) or is not included (“is not”) as part of the current condition “and only if item is in group”.

As of now you have to create multiple automations for each group that you are wanting your item to move from. It gets a little confusing if you have several groups in a board also.

posts.author: maxb (max brinton)
posts.cookedHtml: I second this, but also the ability to change the operator at the beginning of the conditionals so that we always have the option between ‘and’ | ‘or’ respectively.
